name: All-Purpose Mop (Moore)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a nonreactive saucepan.
2. Simmer until onions are tender and translucent.
COOKS NOTES: Butter is essential for this mop. Broth is also crucial to the flavor profile. For brisket, use beef broth; for chicken, make your own chicken stock from the backs and tails of the bird. Incorporate spices from the rub to maintain the same balance of flavors.
